---
title: "Social & Cultural Geography"
subtitle: "Spatial dimensions of culture, identity, religion, language, and social structures."
author: "Geography Team"
toc: true
toc-depth: 3
---

{{< include social-and-cultural/00-syllabus.md >}}

---

Welcome to the **Social & Cultural Geography** module of Geography OpenCourseWare.

---

## Part A: Common Topics (NEP-2020 & UGC NET)

These topics are covered in both the NEP-2020 undergraduate syllabus and the UGC NET syllabus.

{{< include social-and-cultural/01-social-geography-nature-scope.md >}}

{{< include social-and-cultural/02-social-structure-indian-context.md >}}

{{< include social-and-cultural/03-social-justice-wellbeing.md >}}

{{< include social-and-cultural/04-cultural-geography-nature-scope.md >}}

{{< include social-and-cultural/05-cultural-regions-and-hearths.md >}}

{{< include social-and-cultural/06-heritage-and-dwellings.md >}}

{{< include social-and-cultural/07-urban-social-geography.md >}}

---

## Part B: NEP-2020 Specific Topics

These topics are part of the NEP-2020 undergraduate programme only.

{{< include social-and-cultural/08-social-formations-india.md >}}

{{< include social-and-cultural/09-social-empowerment-housing.md >}}

---

## Part C: UGC NET Specific Topics

These topics are part of the UGC NET syllabus only.

{{< include social-and-cultural/10-geography-of-health.md >}}

{{< include social-and-cultural/11-nutrition-and-healthcare.md >}}

{{< include social-and-cultural/12-theories-of-tribal-groups.md >}}

---
